ops.body: Fleet verification complete (2026-07-06). Evidence: (1) CC_SKILLS_REF in cc-interact plugin-template/render.sh @ origin/main fd39accc = ed090c97704f984ff2caed8f9f224816237fe468, an ancestor of cc-skills origin/main f70f0e5a (merge-base --is-ancestor OK). (2) Drift grep vs origin/main of all five consumers (cc-context 8179ac06, cc-review 8f3a33a8, cc-runtime 74eb51b8, slop-cop 11e09aef, cc-skills plugins/slop-cop f70f0e5a): every install-binary.sh line-2 stamp = @ed090c97704f984ff2caed8f9f224816237fe468; canonical template still @pending as designed; no .ps1 anywhere on slop-cop or cc-skills main. Tier-2 fetch (marketplace clone only, no Code dir) renders + stamps @f70f0e5a. (3) Live brew-less run of the cc-skills slop-cop plugin installer (env -i, PATH=/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin): downloaded bare asset slop-cop_darwin_arm64 from v0.1.32, sha256-verified, symlinked into the data dir, --version prints 0.1.32. Releases live: cc-context v0.5.1 (bare ccx_darwin_arm64 + checksums.txt), cc-review v0.19.2, slop-cop v0.1.32 (no .exe/.zip). NOTE on follow-up item 4 (Windows parity / install-binary.ps1): SUPERSEDED by the fleet-wide Windows removal (user decision) — install-binary.ps1 was deleted from slop-cop and cc-skills and the canonical template intentionally has no ps1 twin; no parity work remains.
